channel.title: Health - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.description:
1. Summer Challenge: Put Your Phone Away for Better Sleep  The New York Times
  2. Doomscrolling before bed? Oncologist shares how late-night screen use may ‘confuse’ your brain  Hindustan Times
  3. What Happens to Your Brain When You Get Too Much Late-Night Screen Time  EatingWell
  4. Bedtime smartphone use predicts overnight phone activity in teens, suggests study  Medical Dialogues
  5. Bedtime smartphone use triggers a ‘digital domino effect’ that disrupts teen sleep  Tech Explorist
